title: CI Matrices, Required Checks, Caching, and Merge Policy · Mastery Check
summary: Build a secure required-check workflow across supported environments. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a required CI quality-gate workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate trusted branch workflows from untrusted pull-request code and secrets.
Order cheap discriminating checks before expensive matrices while preserving useful parallelism.
Test declared runtime, operating-system, database, and feature support intentionally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.
